positive: A clean, minimalist illustration of a stylized constellation formed by interconnected geometric lines and abstract celestial bodies (stars and moons). The design should feature deep indigo and cosmic violet gradients contrasted with crisp, luminous gold lines. The arrangement should be symmetrical and aesthetically pleasing, suitable for a central chest graphic on apparel. Use a modern, ethereal, line-art style with subtle glow effects and high contrast. The background should be solid, deep space black or indigo, ensuring the constellation shines brightly. High detail, vector quality, perfect symmetry, clean silhouette, cosmic vaporwave aesthetic.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, logo, watermark, copyright, messy, busy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, lowres, artifacts, poor composition, gradient fade, sepia, photorealistic
